title: Animated Gradient Border Button | Modern CSS Hover Effect
description: A modern button featuring a rotating gradient border effect. It uses CSS pseudo-elements (::before/::after) and keyframe animations to create a 'glow' border that responds to hover states.

title: CSS Heartbeat Pulse Effect | Emoji & Keyframes
description: A pure CSS animation for a pulsing heartbeat effect. It uses keyframes to sync scaling and opacity changes on a loop. This is a lightweight solution for icons or buttons, requiring no JavaScript.

title: Fluid Animated Gradient Background | Responsive Typography UI
description: A responsive hero section featuring a gradient background that transitions via CSS keyframes. It utilises 'background-size' manipulation to create a shifting motion effect. Includes responsive typography using viewport units and the 'Alfa Slab One' Google Font.

title: Minimalist 404 Page | Responsive Error Template
description: A standard 404 error page. Uses a centered layout with a heading and a link to return to the home page. Focused on clear communication without extra scripts or complex styling.

title: Pure CSS Cyclops | Minimalist X-Men Illustration
description: A minimalist recreation of Cyclops from the X-Men, built entirely with CSS shapes. This project uses layered divs and border-radius properties to mimic the geometric vector style of Jag Nagra. A study in CSS positioning and the box model without any external assets or SVGs.

title: Pure CSS Hover Effects | Animated Link Collection
description: A collection of hover effects for links, built with pure CSS. Includes transition styles such as background wipes, animated underlines, and colour shifts.

title: Pure CSS Responsive Contact Form | No-JS Validation
description: A lightweight, responsive contact form built with HTML5 and CSS. Features include native browser validation hints, required field indicators, and focus states for better accessibility. No JavaScript is required for the layout or basic validation.

title: Reddit-Style Loading Animation | Pure CSS Pulsing Loader
description: A pure CSS recreation of the Reddit loading animation. This project utilises keyframe scaling and opacity transitions to create a synchronised pulsing effect.

title: Sci-Fi Avengers ID Card | Pure CSS Glow & HUD Animation
description: Pure CSS Avengers ID card with animated rings, inspired by Tony Stark. Adapted from Kunal Sarkar's 2018 tutorial.

title: Accessible Survey Form | freeCodeCamp Responsive UI Project
description: A comprehensive, responsive survey form featuring a variety of input types — including radio buttons, checkboxes, and dropdowns. Built with semantic HTML to ensure accessibility and screen-reader compatibility. Part of the freeCodeCamp Responsive Web Design certification.

title: Bootstrap Tribute Page | freeCodeCamp Responsive Project
description: A responsive tribute page built for the initial freeCodeCamp curriculum challenge. It uses the Bootstrap grid system for a clean, mobile-first layout. Features include styled typography, list elements, and a centralised image container with a caption.

title: freeCodeCamp: Product Landing Page
description: Geezer is a responsive music streaming product landing page built for freeCodeCamp's Responsive Web Design certification. Discover playlists, stations, and tracks — your music everywhere.

title: Random Quote Generator | freeCodeCamp Project with Twitter Integration
description: An interactive quote generator developed for the freeCodeCamp curriculum. It fetches random data and updates the UI dynamically, featuring a Twitter integration to share specific quotes. This version focuses on a clean layout and smooth state transitions.

title: Random Quote Generator v1 | JavaScript & Dynamic Background Transitions
description: My original 2016 implementation of the freeCodeCamp Random Quote Machine. It features a custom array of quotes and a function that synchronizes background colour shifts with new content generation. A study in early DOM manipulation and state changes.

title: Responsive Tribute Page | Bootstrap Layout Study
description: A responsive tribute page built using the Bootstrap 4 grid system. This project focuses on mobile-first design principles, image scaling within containers, and structured content sections. Developed as part of the freeCodeCamp Responsive Web Design curriculum to practice UI prototyping.

title: Technical Documentation Template | Sidebar Navigation & Fixed Layout
description: A responsive technical documentation layout featuring a fixed sidebar for rapid navigation. Built as a structural template for the freeCodeCamp curriculum, it focuses on section-linking and high-density text presentation. A great foundation for learning CSS layout positioning.

title: Wikipedia Search App | freeCodeCamp API Project
description: A functional search interface built for the freeCodeCamp Wikipedia Viewer challenge. It fetches and displays live results from the Wikipedia API using AJAX. Features include a search bar, result list rendering, and a 'Random Article' shortcut.

title: Binary Clock Logic | HTML5, CSS & JavaScript Implementation
description: A real-time clock that converts current hours, minutes, and seconds into a binary representation. The script handles the decimal-to-binary conversion logic and updates the DOM every second. A useful exercise in bitwise concepts and grid layouts.

title: Custom SVG Download Button | Pure JS Ripple Interaction
description: A standalone download button featuring a custom-drawn SVG icon and a JavaScript-driven ripple effect. On hover, the SVG paths are animated with CSS; on click, JS dynamically creates and cleans up a ripple element at the cursor coordinates. A lightweight UI component built without external icon libraries.

title: Distraction-Free Writing Tool | Accessible JS Word Counter
description: A minimalist, distraction-free writing environment. It features a constrained text width for better readability, high-contrast indicators for word counts, and a clean sans-serif interface. Built with JavaScript to provide real-time feedback without visual clutter.

title: JavaScript Key Event Inspector | Modern Keyboard Event Debugger
description: A real-time diagnostic tool for keyboard events. It captures and displays the 'key', 'code', and modifier states (Shift, Ctrl, Alt, Meta) from the event object. Useful for debugging keyboard shortcuts and verifying cross-browser event consistency.

title: JS String Case Converter | Camel, Snake & Kebab Case Formatter
description: A utility for converting strings into common programming formats, including camelCase, snake_case, PascalCase, and kebab-case. Features an automatic 'copy to clipboard' function upon conversion. This Pen served as the logic prototype for the 'Transform Text' Chrome, Edge, Firefox extension.

title: Particle Explosion Button | HTML5 Canvas & JS
description: A button interaction where clicks trigger a particle burst. The animation uses a custom JavaScript class to generate particles based on the button's CSS colour data, rendered on a transparent HTML5 canvas overlay.

title: Pure JS Parallax Gallery | Full-Viewport Scroll Transitions
description: A full-viewport photo gallery using a custom parallax scroll implementation. It uses JavaScript to calculate scroll offsets and apply varying transform speeds to image layers. Built without external libraries.

title: Real-Time JavaScript Search Filter | Dynamic Data Table
description: A client-side search application that filters a dataset of superheroes in real-time. It uses an input event listener to trigger a filter on a JavaScript object array, dynamically updating a table display without page refreshes. An example of basic state management and DOM manipulation.

title: Scroll-Triggered Background Colour Switch | JS & Data Attributes
description: A script that transitions the page background colour as different sections enter the viewport. It reads a 'data-color' attribute from each section to determine the target hex code. Uses CSS transitions for smooth colour blending.

title: Secure Password Generator | Web Crypto API & Clean Formatting
description: A client-side password generator using the Web Crypto API for secure, unbiased random integer generation. Outputs a formatted 15-character string (XXX-XXX-XXX-XXX) for better readability. Includes clipboard integration and keyboard shortcuts (Spacebar) for rapid generation.

title: Clean Portfolio Template | CSS Grid & Scroll Reveals
description: A minimalist portfolio layout using CSS for structure and typography. Features include scroll-triggered visibility for sections, smooth-scroll navigation, and a functional contact form UI with a basic honeypot anti-spam field.

title: One-Page Bootstrap Portfolio | Responsive Personal Template
description: A single-page portfolio built with Bootstrap, featuring a fixed navigation bar, scroll-spy functionality, and a responsive grid layout. Includes sections for a professional bio, project gallery, and a contact form. Originally designed to bridge the gap between education and web development.

title: Ghostbusters Logo Animation | Pure CSS & SVG (no JS)
description: A custom recreation of the Ghostbusters logo, hand-traced in Affinity Designer and animated entirely with CSS. It uses keyframe sequences to handle scaling and opacity transitions without JavaScript. Created as a technical challenge for the CodePen Halloween event.

title: GSAP SVG Animation | Interactive Computer Assembly Sequence
description: A scripted SVG animation built with GSAP. It uses a timeline to coordinate the assembly of computer components with staggered scaling and bounce eases. The interface includes interactive button states and a controlled animation sequence.

title: Holiday Snowfall Animation | HTML5 Canvas & CSS Lights
description: A festive UI featuring a particle-based snowfall rendered on an HTML5 canvas and CSS-animated Christmas lights. The JavaScript handles snowflake physics and responsive canvas resizing, while CSS transitions manage the background and decorative elements.

title: Pure CSS SVG UFO Animation | Hand-Drawn Vector Motion
description: A custom SVG UFO animation built with pure CSS keyframes. This project features a layered vector illustration with independent animations for the ship's hover effect and the background starfield. No JavaScript was used for the motion, relying entirely on CSS transforms and opacity transitions.

title: SVG Rorschach Morphing Effect | CSS Gooey Filter
description: An organic, symmetrical animation using SVG Gaussian blur and colour matrix filters to create a 'gooey' blob effect. The motion is driven by CSS keyframes and includes a media query to respect 'prefers-reduced-motion' settings. Inspired by Rorschach inkblots.

title: Vivus.js SVG Animation | Restart & Replay Functionality
description: An implementation of the Vivus.js library for stroke-drawing SVG animations. Includes custom JavaScript to handle animation delays and a manual 'Restart' button that resets path data to replay the sequence.
